title: Build the sandboxed Windows Electron shell
summary: Wrap the Web client in Electron with context isolation, sandboxing, minimal preload ports and a smoke build; do not expose arbitrary Node APIs.
acceptance: nodeIntegration is disabled and contextIsolation/sandbox are enabled
Preload exposes only typed placeholder platform ports
Development and packaged smoke builds launch on Windows CI or an approved equivalent
Security checklist has no unresolved high finding
